ExportWorkflowOverlay.title: Export Workflow as Code
ExportWorkflowOverlay.description: Export your workflow as a standalone Next.js project that you can run independently.
ExportWorkflowOverlay.additionalInfo: This will generate a complete Next.js project containing your workflow code. Once exported, you can run your workflow outside of the Workflow Builder, deploy it to Vercel, or integrate it into your existing applications.
